_meta.note: varicode_bits = per-char PSK31 Varicode codeword (MSB-first, as written in varicodetab1[]) followed by the '00' inter-character separator. This is the exact BPSK payload bitstream fldigi feeds its differential encoder; omnimodem's framing::varicode::encode(&PSK31, msg) must reproduce it byte-for-byte. The differential BPSK symbol-phase stream (0=reversal, 1=steady) follows from these bits by the single-differential PSK31 rule and is exercised by the loopback rate-grid KAT, since fldigi's tx_symbol path is entangled with its modem/FLTK runtime.
